items.title: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
items.summary: Lorde was performing at the Real Cool Festival in Madrid on Thursday and took some time during her set to speak out against AI glasses. items.title: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
items.summary: Apple's self-driving car program never really got off the ground, but it may have been what made the company's chips the powerful AI performers they are. Early in the development of the self-driving platform, Apple realized that it would need powerful on-device AI processing. While the car processor

items.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
items.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

items.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
items.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."

items.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
items.summary: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. items.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
items.summary: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. items.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
items.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

items.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. items.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
items.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

items.title: Disable autoplay and infinite scroll or risk massive fines, EU tells Meta
items.summary: Digital Services Act may force Meta to make big changes on its platforms.

items.title: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
items.summary: Though Instagram head Adam Mosseri doesn't want to filter out AI content on the platform, he argues that you "shouldn't have it in your feed" if you don't like it. items.title: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
items.summary: A solar and home energy storage company is expanding into AI data centers, but not by building one - instead, it's offering to pay its customers to put its compute units in their homes. items.title: Sperm donors need limits, says a European fertility group
items.summary: Ties van der Meer doesn’t know how many siblings he has. The 47-year-old was conceived at a private fertility clinic in the Netherlands using sperm provided by an anonymous donor. items.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
items.summary: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

items.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
items.summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

items.title: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
items.summary: Microsoft may once again be struggling to keep up with its own climate goals, according to its 2026 sustainability report. Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s No. 2 role
items.summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.

items.title: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
items.summary: OpenAI's Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company's AGI chief and is transitioning to being a "part-time advisor," she said on X. items.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
items.summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

items.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
items.summary: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

items.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
items.summary: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.
